intro: Florida's Attorney General is suing OpenAI and Sam Altman, alleging the company marketed ChatGPT while ignoring documented safety risks. Anthropic has confidentially filed for an IPO at a $965 billion valuation, joining OpenAI and SpaceX in pursuing public listings this year. Amazon's $8 billion investment in Anthropic is now worth $74 billion, underscoring the financial stakes of the AI industry's rapid expansion.

whitelist.title: Florida sues OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman over allegations of marketing ChatGPT despite serious risks of user safety | Fortune
whitelist.desc: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier alleges the company marketed ChatGPT adoption to the public while intentionally ignoring safety warnings.

whitelist.desc: Financial stakes of the AI race rise as Elon Musk’s SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic are slated to go public this year
